summary: v3.0/v4.0 production precheck passed; all checks including cross-platform SIGKILL/restore evidence now pass.

checks.label: v3.0 Gate-2 live fixture
checks.caveat: Default-profile live fixture evidence only; not broad production long-horizon breadth.

checks.label: v3.0 Reviewer gate boundary
checks.caveat: Reviewer gate boundary integration evidence; not full reviewer-driven production proof.

checks.label: v3.0 production breadth
checks.caveat: D135 multi-scenario default-profile replay evidence; replay reuses evaluateGate2Transcript and is not a new live external Gate-2 run.

checks.label: v4.0 cross-session Agent OS
checks.caveat: Deterministic cross-session JSONL fixture evidence; not real Agent OS orchestration proof.

checks.label: v4.0 persistent memory recovery
checks.caveat: Atomic write + partial-last-line recovery evidence; not real cross-platform SIGKILL tests.

checks.label: v4.0 cross-platform SIGKILL/restore
checks.caveat: D136 cross-platform SIGKILL/restore evidence from process-kill, docker-stop, and session-crash-recovery scenarios with preserved data integrity.

checks.label: Default registry exposure invariant
checks.caveat: Narrow default must remain coding plus Code Intel essentials; non-coding surfaces require explicit opt-in.

defaultExposure.caveat: Narrow default registry (21 tools: coding + Code Intel essentials); non-coding surfaces require explicit opt-in.

nextActions: Keep Browser, Desktop, Channel, media, and productivity tools out of non-coding default exposure.
